title: Supporting code for "A pointwise conservative method for thermochemical convection under the compressible anelastic liquid approximation"
author: Nathan Sime
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
The geopart source code at the time of writing "A pointwise conservative method for thermochemical convection under the compressible anelastic liquid approximation". 

 Also included is a Docker file which will run FEniCS 2019 in addition to cloning and compiling dolfin_dg, a fork of LEoPart and geopart with the appropriate git hashes at the time of writing.
steps_raw:
The geopart source code at the time of writing "A pointwise conservative method for thermochemical convection under the compressible anelastic liquid approximation".
